title: Endurance Requirement Set
description: Formal endurance requirements including continuous flight duration energy reserve margins and structural fatigue allowance

title: Station-Keeping Requirement Set
description: Station-keeping requirements: geofence radius wind field design envelope position accuracy and drift tolerance

title: Energy Balance Requirement Set
description: Solar harvest requirements battery capacity day/night energy balance and power budget allocation

title: Payload Budget Requirement Set
description: Mass power and thermal allocations for comms EO and ISR payload classes

title: Altitude and Performance Requirement Set
description: Operating altitude band 18–22 km ascent performance descent limits and atmospheric performance margins

title: Regulatory Compliance Requirement Set
description: Type certificate applicability ICAO annex compliance ITU spectrum filing and national airspace approval requirements

title: Structural Life Requirement Set
description: Fatigue life cycles UV exposure tolerance thermal cycle count and structural inspection intervals

title: Launch and Recovery Requirement Set
description: Launch window constraints transit configuration ground handling mass/volume envelope and recovery capture requirements

title: Data Architecture Requirement Set
description: Downlink capacity latency budget data security and ground segment interface requirements
